chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 84 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag „A‟ 2. For hearing of CMA No.373/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 15.04.2025 Mr. Rehmat Ali alias Raza Ali Shaikh, Advocate for Petitioners Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< SIP Ghulam Abbas, Investigating Officer Crime No.06/2025 of Police Station, Miro Khan, District Shahdadkot at Kamber is present and files statement along with certain documents, same are taken on record. He submits that Petitioner No.1, the alleged abductee namely Mst. Fakhra Ali was produced before the concerned Magistrate, where her 164 Cr.PC statement has been recorded, wherein she has shown her willingness to go with her parents. Further in her statement, the Petitioner No.1 has stated that she will seek Khulla by filing Family Suit in the Court of Law. The Investigating Officer further submits that after completing the investigation in view of the statement of the alleged abductee, Mst. Fakhra, the Petitioner No.1, he is of the view that case is to be disposed of under “C” class. On such statement of the Investigation Officer, the Counsel for the Petitioners seeks disposal of the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the Petition is disposed of with directions to Investigating Officer to file such report, as suggested by him within 15 (fifteen) days before the Court of Law having jurisdiction. However, the official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioner No.1 in accordance with the law.

Accordingly, the Petition is disposed of with directions to Investigating Officer to file such report, as suggested by him within 15 (fifteen) days before the Court of Law having jurisdiction. However, the official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioner No.1 in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
